title: Xtra Juicy Mediterranean Fish Pilaf
description: A comforting Mediterranean dish packed with flavors and textures, featuring juicy fish and a tangy rice vinegar dressing.

ingredients.name: white fish fillets (such as cod or tilapia)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the chopped parsley and dill and cook for 1 minute.
Add the pickled cucumber and cook for 1 minute.
Add the uncooked rice to the saucepan and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes or until the rice is cooked.
While the rice cooks, prepare the fish fillets by seasoning with salt and black pepper.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat and sear the fish fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Flake the cooked fish into large pieces and add to the cooked rice mixture.
Stir in the white wine vinegar and serve hot.
Garnish with additional parsley and dill, if desired.
